description: TabMail Multi-Message Chip experiment API — paints the iOS-style action chip on each row of multimessageview.xhtml (collapsed-thread / multi-select summary) and emits an event when a chip is clicked. Passive painter: never writes action state.

functions.name: init
functions.description: Register window listeners and paint chips into all currently-displayed multimessageview surfaces. Idempotent.

functions.name: shutdown
functions.description: Detach all delegations/observers, remove all chips, unregister window listener.

functions.name: refreshAll
functions.description: Repaint chips on every multimessageview surface. Idempotent. Triggered from MV3 by messageDisplay.onMessagesDisplayed and by actionCache write/clear paths. The experiment also self-triggers on #messageList rebuilds via an internal MutationObserver.

events.name: onActionChipClick
events.description: Fired when the user clicks/activates a multi-message-view chip. The payload identifies the message whose chip was clicked — MV3 should act on that exact message regardless of any selection state.

weMsgId.description: WebExtension message id of the chip's message
